name: translate_stream
description: Stream the translation of a long document or text. Returns plain text.

text.description: The text or document to translate.

sourceLang.description: Source language. If omitted, it is auto-detected.

domain.description: Subject domain hint to improve terminology accuracy (e.g. 'legal', 'medical', 'technical', 'literary'). Optional.

output.description: The translated text as plain text.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
